mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO message_statistics_timeseries (server_id, channel_id, connector_id, ts, bucket_size_minutes, received, filtered, queued, sent, error) VALUES
(#{r.serverId}, #{r.channelId}, #{r.connectorId}, #{r.ts}, #{r.bucketSizeMinutes}, #{r.received}, #{r.filtered}, #{r.queued}, #{r.sent}, #{r.error})
